prose: Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on aniline (14 atoms) using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz file (not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Results: HOMO = −5.553772 eV, LUMO = −0.2489544 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value) = 5.3048177 eV (Koopmans orbital eigenvalue difference, not an excitation energy). Total electronic energy = −287.71578 Eh. Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed. Density fitting (RI) is on by default in the PySCF backend.
